name_en: In stock 25C Hobo Bag - Denim Small
name_cn:
In stock 25C Hobo Bag - Denim Small
This bag is surprisingly light and beautiful in person. It has four slip pockets 👝, giving the whole bag a lot of energy. The chain is chunky, but the bag feels light on the shoulder. It's the kind of bag you can grab and go 😎. The body is made of lambskin, and the hardware is vintage, looking super textured!!! The capacity is huge; it can fit a large phone, sunglasses 🕶️, and more... It's not small at all. Highly recommended for daily use or taking photos 👍👍
Size: 22*31*15*cm
Model: AS5339
